root_causes: CONFIRMED_SIGNIN_VS_SIGNUP_CLAIM_TOKEN_READ_ASYMMETRY: signIn gated model claim on isModelClaimFlowActive(); signUp read readModelClaimToken() unconditionally — post-confirm sign-in could skip claim while token remained in sessionStorage.

CONFIRMED_STORAGE_VISIBILITY_MISMATCH: can_view_model_photo_storage(model_id) required models.is_visible_commercial/fashion for clients; model_photos RLS used is_visible_to_clients + has_platform_access + caller_is_client_org_member — clients saw rows but signed URLs failed.
fixed_now: AuthContext signIn: read claim token whenever persisted (parity with signUp); no other auth changes.

Migration 20260501_can_view_model_photo_storage_client_row_alignment.sql: can_view_model_photo_storage(full object path); client branch binds to model_photos row + paywall + org; policy passes name not foldername[2].
send-invite model_claim email: note on email confirm + reopening invite link if profile does not connect.
rules_updated: .cursorrules (§6 bullets: claim parity + client photo alignment)
do_not_touch: bootstrapThenLoadProfile / Step-1 vs Step-2 structure (except single claim-read line in signIn)
